title: TechCrunch is heading to Tokyo — and bringing the Startup Battlefield with it
title_zh: TechCrunch 即将登陆东京——并带来 Startup Battlefield
abstract: SusHi Tech 2026 is zeroing in on four technology domains reshaping society: AI, Robotics, Resilience, and Entertainment. Expect live demos of humanoid robots, sessions on autonomous driving's software revolution, deep dives into cyber defense and climate tech, and candid conversations about how AI is rewriting the global music and anime industries.
abstract_zh: SusHi Tech 2026 聚焦于重塑社会的四大技术领域：人工智能、机器人、韧性与娱乐。届时将有人形机器人现场演示、自动驾驶软件革命专题讨论、网络防御与气候科技深度探讨，以及关于 AI 如何改写全球音乐与动漫产业的坦诚对话。
tldr_zh: TechCrunch 将携 Startup Battlefield 活动登陆东京。
cover_zh: TechCrunch 要来东京了｜还带来了 Startup Battlefield 大赛
